title: SectionList – Grouped Data
description: Display data in sections with headers, like a contacts list.

slides.title: What is SectionList? 📂
SectionList Example
slides.content: A simple contacts list grouped by first letter:

quizData.question: What prop does SectionList use instead of `data`?
quizData.explanation: SectionList uses the `sections` prop, an array of section objects.

slides.title: SectionList Props
slides.content:
## Additional Props

* `renderSectionHeader` – renders a header for each section.
* `renderSectionFooter` – footer for each section.
* `stickySectionHeadersEnabled` – if true, section headers stick to the top while scrolling (default on iOS, can be enabled on Android).
* `SectionList` also supports all the performance props from `FlatList` (`initialNumToRender`, etc.).

slides.title: Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content: Use `SectionList` for any grouped data. It's perfect for settings screens, contact lists, or any UI with category headers.
